name: The Great Chimera
overview: In the early 20th century, a brilliant Italian Woman, entranced by classical Greek culture, falls in love with a ship owner and moves to a thriving Greek island, throwing herself into a vortex of passion, emancipation and self-destruction.

trailers.title: Η Μεγάλη Χίμαιρα | H πολυαναμενόμενη σειρά στην ΕΡΤ
